description_long: This is a modern athletic sneaker, predominantly light gray with accents of orange and darker gray. The shoe features a mesh toe box for breathability, synthetic overlays for structure, and a padded collar and tongue for comfort. The side panels display a large orange-bordered 'N' logo, characteristic of New Balance branding, and the heel area is reinforced with a darker gray suede-like material. The midsole is thick and cushioned, designed for support and shock absorption, while the outsole appears to have a durable, grippy tread. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with flat white laces, and branding is visible on the tongue and heel.
description: A light gray athletic sneaker with orange and dark gray accents, mesh toe box, and prominent New Balance branding. Features a cushioned sole, criss-cross lacing, and a supportive, padded design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the mesh toe box, criss-cross lacing, and the 'new balance' logo on the tongue.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the large orange-bordered 'N' logo, layered materials, and the thick, sculpted midsole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the dark gray heel counter, orange accent line, and 'new balance' branding on the heel tab.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the 'N' logo, layered construction, and visible midsole details.
attribute_logo: White 'new balance' text on tongue and heel, large orange-bordered 'N' on side panels
